title: DataEnvelope
description: Common envelope for asset-management data sub-schemas (pricing, rating, marketData). Mirrors the router's AssetDataItem on POST /data/assets/ingest. Each data sub-schema reuses this envelope and defines only the `data` payload. Introduced by epic #1236.

timestamp.description: Last update time from the source (ISO 8601).

priority.description: Source priority for conflict resolution when multiple connectors supply the same field. New vs. router AssetDataItem.

data.description: Payload conforming to the referenced sub-schema.
